CreateEipGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, see [clientToken](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateEipGroup.routeType: Line type: Standard BGP (BGP) or Enhanced BGP (BGP_S). Defaults to Standard BGP.
CreateEipGroup.eipCount: Number of IPv4 EIPs in the shared bandwidth. Minimum is 0; maximum is n (Standard BGP: n*1Mbps must be less than total shared bandwidth; Enhanced BGP: n*20Mbps must be less than total shared bandwidth).
CreateEipGroup.eipv6Count: Number of IPv6 EIPs in the shared bandwidth. Minimum is 0; maximum is quota-controlled, default is 256.
CreateEipGroup.bandwidthInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps. For prepay EIP Groups, Standard BGP must be an integer between 20 and 500; Enhanced BGP must be an integer between 100 and 5000.
CreateEipGroup.billing.billingMethod: Billing method: ByTraffic, ByBandwidth, ByPeak95 (postpaid shared bandwidth only), or ByNetrafficMax (postpaid shared bandwidth only).
CreateEipGroup.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for postpaid; required for prepaid.
CreateEipGroup.name: 1 to 65 characters, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and special characters -_/. If not specified, the service will auto-generate a name.
CreateEipGroup.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created.
CreateEipGroup.tags.tagKey: Tag key. Can contain uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 1 to 65.
CreateEipGroup.tags.tagValue: Tag value. Can contain uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 0 to 65.
CreateEipGroup.resourceGroupId: ID of the resource group to bind when creating the shared bandwidth.
